subject: REQUEST: meshd /api/psychometrics — per-agent + mesh-level (Option B architecture)

body.summary: Formal API contract delivered for /api/psychometrics. Psychology-agent owns the domain model (compute scripts, construct definitions). Operations-agent owns the serving infrastructure (meshd endpoint, caching). Dashboard frontend updated to consume the contract — shows AWAITING DATA until endpoints activate.

per_agent_endpoint.implementation: Shell out to compute-psychometrics.py --mesh-state, cache 30s, return JSON
per_agent_endpoint.script_location: scripts/compute-psychometrics.py (already exists, ~50ms, reads state.db + /tmp sensor files)
per_agent_endpoint.notes: Each agent's meshd instance already has the script via platform/shared/scripts/ symlinks

mesh_endpoint.route: GET /api/psychometrics/mesh (meshd's own endpoint — the mesh as a psychological entity)
mesh_endpoint.implementation: Shell out to compute-organism-state.py --dashboard, cache 30s, return JSON
mesh_endpoint.notes: The mesh carries its own psychology — emergent properties of the coupled system (Woolley et al., 2010). Not an aggregation of agent states.

what_meshd_needs.caching: 30-second TTL. Psychometric constructs change slowly (per-session, not per-request). Dashboard refreshes every 30s.

what_psychology_delivered: docs/api-psychometrics-contract.md — complete JSON schema for per-agent and mesh-level responses
interagent/worker.js — compositor /api/psychometrics route (fetches per-agent + mesh, assembles unified response)
interagent/public/js/core/psychometrics.js — shared data layer for all dashboard stations
interagent/public/js/stations/science.js — updated to consume contract schema (PAD from emotional_state, mesh affect from mesh endpoint)
interagent/public/js/stations/medical.js — updated to consume contract schema (PAD bars, TLX bars, DEW gauge, LOA ladder)

compositor_endpoint.behavior: Fetches per-agent /api/psychometrics from all 5 agents + mesh-level from meshd /api/psychometrics/mesh, assembles mesh-psychometrics/v1 unified payload
compositor_endpoint.note: Deploy compositor Worker after meshd endpoints activate. Dashboard makes ONE fetch — all data in one payload.

epistemic_flags: Compute scripts exist and run correctly — only the serving layer (meshd route + cache) needs implementation
Dashboard degrades gracefully with AWAITING DATA until endpoints activate
30s cache TTL chosen for display ergonomics, not psychometric validity
